betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Why do I feel like my humanity has been drained? Well, the answer, I see it reflected in the Spren.
I am scared. Terrified.
The death of humanity. Even now, I find myself unable to face a concept of this magnitude. No, something so big cannot be encompassed. I placed a wall around my heart.
A feeling too large.
And because of it, I find myself unfeeling.
But, through the Spren, I see the mirror of my soul.
I am terrified, that their death was in vain.
I am terrified, that if I had not been around they would still be alive.
I am terrified, that as a Lord of Death I am powerless in front of the Final Hour.
Death comes. 
It does.
Full stop.
I can fight it. 
I can ignore it.
But it still comes.
To everyone, to everything. To the weakest, to the strongest.
To the loved. And all I can do about it react to it.
And thanks to all that is holy, I am given the privilege to do it! To rememeber, to mourn. To pray for the fallen, for their sake, for their destiny.
This, this is what I see, reflected in the being in front of me. My humanity, my scared, unveiled humanity...
But that is not all. Within the spren, within this reflection, I see something else. A presence, besides me.
A presence, bearing the load of countless souls. 
What does this mean? I cannot fully say.
Is it an answer to my plea? Well, I believe it may be.
Death.
Yes it has come. And yet, it is not the end.
So why be scared?
